data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified merge commit feb1bdb127ca is live on origin/main, CI run 23405982215 and Coverage Badge run 23405982239 both completed successfully for that SHA, and targeted local regression coverage passed for beat creation, scope refinement queue/worker/defaults, settings, status endpoint, and notifications (68 tests). Added missing shipped-history tag commit:d6333eff1200.
